narrative:
Precinct Wellington Vill East (precinct in Lorain County) has 979 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
